shared_attributes.interaction: spawned and consumed by game systems

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Waste product, spawns on floor over time, triggers dirty state when 3+ present
context.screen_position: On floor area (y=110 to y=125), random x positions
context.usage_scenario: Spawns every 20 minutes. Max 5 visible. When 3+ present, Echo enters dirty state. Player swipes floor to remove all poop, triggering sparkle effect.

animation.description: No animation. Static until removed by cleaning.

visual_specification.details: 2x2px brown (#AB5236) pixel cluster. Slightly irregular shape. Spawns at random x positions within floor bounds (x=10 to x=118). Multiple poop objects can exist simultaneously (max 5). All removed instantly when floor is swiped.

relationships.shared_with: Brown color with perch, food_bowl, Echo's beak/feet
relationships.differences_from: seed: brown vs orange, on floor vs in bowl, waste vs food, 2x2px vs 3x3px. Triggers negative state vs positive.

explicit_negations: No smell lines or stink waves
No gradual fade-in when spawning (instant appear)
Does not pile up or stack
